name: Metamaterial Inc.
summary: Metamaterial Inc. designs, develops, and manufactures advanced materials specializing in nanocomposites, nanofabrication, and machine learning to control light and electromagnetic waves. It offers metaAIR, an optical filter to provide laser eye protection; metaVISION, a head-up and augmented reality display components; NanoWeb, a transparent metal mesh that is used in heaters for de-icing/de-fogging; NanoWeb Touch, a transparent metal mesh for touch-sensor applications in displays; and NanoWeb Power, a transparent metal mesh for electrode applications in solar cells and energy harvesting devices. The company also develops NanoWeb Connect, a transparent metal mesh for antenna applications in telecommunication devices; NanoWeb Protect, a transparent metal mesh for electromagnetic interference protection applications; metaSURFACE, a passive resonator to boost the signal, speed, and image quality for MRI medical imaging equipment; and GlucoWise, a non-invasive glucose monitoring sensor for diabetes management applications. It serves energy, automotive, aerospace and defense, consumer electronics, and medical industries. The company was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Dartmouth, Canada.
